children.label: A
children.text: separation of the member allegedly contrary to laws or regulations, or predicated upon alleged inaccuracy, omission, error, or falsely prejudicial character of information in any part of the official personnel record of the member;

children.label: B
children.text: other alleged violation, misinterpretation, or misapplication of applicable laws, regulations, or published policy affecting the terms and conditions of the employment or career status of the member;

children.label: C
children.text: allegedly wrongful disciplinary action against the member;

children.label: D
children.text: dissatisfaction with respect to the working environment of the member;

children.label: E
children.text: alleged inaccuracy, omission, error, or falsely prejudicial character of information in the official personnel record of the member which is or could be prejudicial to the member;

children.label: F
children.text: action alleged to be in the nature of reprisal or other interference with freedom of action in connection with participation by the member in procedures under this subchapter;

children.label: G
children.text: alleged denial of an allowance, premium pay, or other financial benefit to which the member claims entitlement under applicable laws or regulations; and

children.label: v
children.text: any rule, regulation, or policy directive prescribed under any provision of law described in clauses (i) through (iv).

The scope of grievances described in paragraph (1) may be modified by written agreement between the Department and the labor organization accorded recognition as the exclusive representative under subchapter X (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “exclusive representative”).
an individual assignment of a member under subchapter V, other than an assignment alleged to be contrary to law or regulation;

the judgment of a selection board established under , a tenure board established under , or any other equivalent body established by laws or regulations which similarly evaluates the performance of members of the Service on a comparative basis;section 4002 of this titlesection 3946(b) of this title

the expiration of a limited appointment, the termination of a limited appointment under , or the denial of a limited career extension or of a renewal of a limited career extension under ; orsection 4011 of this titlesection 4007(b) of this title
any complaint or appeal where a specific statutory hearing procedure exists, except as provided in .section 4139(a)(2) of this title

children.label: c
children.text: This subchapter applies only with respect to the Department of State, Broadcasting Board of Governors, the Agency for International Development, the Department of Agriculture, and the Department of Commerce.1So in original. Probably should be “the Broadcasting”.1
